title: In-step turn answer
description: Persisted answer to a turn-question (F-012). Written by the responder (CLI / Web UI / assist session); read by the engine which then resumes the provider session with the answer as the next user message.

selected_option.description: 0-based index into the question's `options` array, when applicable.

responder.description: Identifier of the human / agent that supplied the answer. Audit-only.
